name: Features Bento Grid
description: An asymmetric bento-box feature grid with mixed tile sizes, tilt-on-hover micro-interactions, and per-card accent tints — designed to land the playful, bold, energetic register that a calmer editorial layout can't reach.

descriptions.descriptive: An asymmetric grid where one large hero tile anchors the composition, surrounded by medium and small tiles in a varied bento arrangement. Mixed corner radii, per-card accent gradients in the corners, and spring-physics tilt on hover give the section a playful, alive quality. Tiles use Feather icons in tinted backplates and stack to a single column below the large breakpoint.
descriptions.usage: Reach for this section when you need to showcase 5–7 features or benefits with visual variety rather than a flat row. The size hierarchy lets you put the most important benefit in the large tile and supporting points around it. Best paired with bold or energetic hero sections; avoid below editorial, calm openers where the playful tilt feels off-tone.
descriptions.audienceFit: Fits creator tools, indie studios, lifestyle DTC, edtech, fintech-for-consumers — anywhere the brand voice leans warm, energetic, and confidently un-corporate. Less suitable for legal, financial advisory, or heritage-luxury brands that need restraint.
